notes.action: Redesign interaction protocol to be adaptive rather than mandatory staged execution
notes.details: Add early detection of user preference (direct vs. staged) in Step 0; make pause blocks optional based on user signals; allow complete output when information is already sufficient

notes.action: Enhance output quality to justify the structured approach
notes.details: When using staged interaction, ensure each step provides substantial standalone value; add quick-win insights in clarification requests so users get immediate value

notes.action: Revise output contract to balance structure with actionability
notes.details: Reduce emphasis on format compliance markers (pause blocks, step labels) when they conflict with user experience; prioritize clear recommendations over structural perfection
